title: Enderite CJ Edition
description: Enderite adds a better type of Netherite which has special effects, that you can configure!
body:
# The Enderite CJ Edition Mod
![](https://github.com/Craftjakob/Enderite-CJ-Edition/blob/Wiki/Pictures/Enderite%20CJ%20Edition.png?raw=true)
You can configure everything in the Configs and you can see them [here](https://github.com/Craftjakob/Enderite-CJ-Edition/wiki/Configs)!
(You can turn off/on all most everything!)

- The Enderite Helmet makes Endermans friendly like a pumpkin.
- The Enderite Chestplate can you combine with an elytra.
- The Enderite Leggings removes the Levitation effect, if shift is pressed.
- And The Enderite Boots allows you to run faster on End Stones.

Available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enderite-cj-edition) and [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderite-cj-edition/)

Has support for my Gilded Netherite CJ Edition, More Bows, More Crossbows and Netherite Horse Armor Mod!

Crafting
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![](https://github.com/Craftjakob/Enderite-CJ-Edition/blob/Wiki/Crafting/Smithing%20Table%20Recipes.gif?raw=true)
![](https://github.com/Craftjakob/Enderite-CJ-Edition/blob/Wiki/Crafting/Crafting_Table_Recipes.gif?raw=true)
![](https://github.com/Craftjakob/Enderite-CJ-Edition/blob/Wiki/Crafting/Smelting%20Blastin%20Recipes.gif?raw=true)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Feel you free to use it in your Modpacks/Servers!

Please write Feedback in the comment section or on GitHub!

**MAKE SURE THAT YOU DON'T UPLOAD MY MOD ON OTHER WEBSITES. THE ONLY WAY IS TO LINK IT TO THE CURSEFORGE/MODRINTH SITE AND DOWNLOAD IT ON CURSEFORGE/MODRINTH. NOWHERE ELSE!**

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
My other Mods:
Gilded Netherite CJ Edition, Netherite Horse Armor, More Bows, More Corssbows
